top_signals.title: Oil Prices Surge, Brent Rises above $80 as Trump Ends Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped above $80 a barrel after US President Donald Trump said a tentative ceasefire with Iran was over, reigniting geopolitical risk premium in prices and triggering investor concern about supply disruptions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
